seo.metaDescription: The VATGenius Partner Benefits: Revenue, Retention, Differentiation. Discover why leading neobanks choose VATGenius for automated VAT refund solutions.

hero.title: The VATGenius Partner Benefits:
benefits: Fees are only incurred when VAT is actually refunded. No financial risk for the customer.
You only incur costs for integration. Your income can exceed these costs many times over.
The service justifies a higher price point for the business account.
Increase customer loyalty. High-value service makes switching less attractive.
Option to label VAT recovery as your own service or third-party service.
Traditional accounts leave money on the table. You can improve your market position.
Plug-and-Play Integration. Go Live in Weeks.

items.title: Integration
items.description: Ready for Pilot in 4-8 Weeks. Very low technical debt and resources needed from your side.

items.title: Operational Support
items.description: We handle all legal, compliance, and customer support related to the VAT process. Your workload is minimal.

items.title: Marketing & Sales Enablement
items.description: We provide materials and training to help your sales team effectively promote the new service.

items.title: Neobank Integration Expertise
items.description: We are experts in handling transaction data, statements, and documentation formats from leading Neobanks, significantly reducing preparation time and errors.

items.title: Pan-European Service
items.description: Full support for cross-border Input Tax Reimbursement Claims (8th and 13th Directive VAT Refunds). We handle submission to final payout.

items.title: Speed & Efficiency
items.description: Our streamlined, digital-first approach means quicker claim filing and faster processing compared to manual, paper-based methods.

items.title: Success-Based Model
items.description: We often operate on a "No Win, No Fee" basis, ensuring our success is directly tied to yours.

items.title: Compliance & Assurance
items.description: We ensure every claim is 100% compliant with local and EU-wide regulations, protecting your business from future audits.

cta.title: Ready to Partner with VATGenius?
cta.buttonText: Request a Live Demo & Partnership Consultation
